##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Reddish brown elongated crystals. Associated with ushkovite (R060954), atencioite, rockbridgeite, and albite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140074
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Fe_1.02_Mn_0.81_Ca_0.13_Mg_0.04_)Al_1.99_(Be_1.02_Li_0.08_)(P_0.99_O_4_)_2_(OH)_6_ ; The BeO and Li2O contents were taken from R140428, which were determined by ICP-MS.
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
